project.name: Vespucci Hospitaal EMS Webapp
project.auth: Supabase Auth with email and password

v1_modules: cases for complex or specialized follow-up
out_of_scope_or_later: direct gameplay integration with OP ambulance MDT

identity_model.patients_and_staff: separate tables, same citizenid may exist in both domains

config_strategy.patient_statuses: system codes with UI-managed labels, colors, order, active flag

demo_mode.production_mode: real auth and real database preferred

roles_and_access.extra_role_model: stored as regular profiles with rank_id = null and extra permissions
permissions_notes: administratie and directie_assistent currently inherit the same permission shape as operationele leiding
operationele leiding deliberately has no beheerpagina/config/databasebeheer access
rank_5 and rank_6 may only edit their own reports
lower ranks may see a basic staff list without sensitive details
specializations can grant extra rights, but the detailed specialization-right matrix is still open

specializations.note: database supports specialization-based permissions, but concrete extra-right assignments per specialization are not finalized yet

case_domain.purpose: complex or specialized follow-up only, separate from standard report flow
rules: a patient may have multiple cases
a report may exist without a case
cases have their own quick view and edit page

report_behavior: reports can be linked to a case or be standalone
reports are visible in patient history
reports open from patient detail but are only editable from the report page itself
after creating or updating a report, redirect back to the patient record

personnel_domain.salary_model: base salary by rank plus specialization bonuses, but database salary columns are not fully formalized yet

requirements: remove via list of active strikepoints

management_page.purpose: broader beheer page, not just audit log
layout: rapporttypenbeheer and tags_badges side by side

ui_and_theme.visual_direction: calm blue hospital theme with optional dark mode
ui_and_theme.home_page: staff portal, not marketing landing page
top_navigation: Beheer only if permission is present
login_flow: dashboard shows personal welcome text with staff name

seeding_strategy.production: minimal bootstrap only, no fake patient or staff records

security_notes: do not use the /rest/v1 path in NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY should not be exposed to the live app unless a server-side admin feature explicitly needs it
the service role key that was shared during setup should be rotated before production

implemented: schema.sql and seed.sql applied without SQL errors
first directie admin user created and linked to rank_1
patients live reads and writes connected
reports live reads and writes connected
personnel live reads and writes largely connected
beheer page reads audit log data
feedback banners and redirect-based success/error UX added
still_to_finish_before_confident_product: remaining non-core modules like meetings and handbook

recommended_next_steps: push ems-webapp as a clean standalone GitHub repository
set production env vars in Vercel
run live smoke test: login, create patient, update patient, create case, create report, view audit log
rotate the leaked Supabase service role key before public production use

import_guidance.purpose: use this file as starter context in a new project or new chat
import_guidance.suggested_prompt: Load this JSON as the project handoff context and continue from the current implementation state without re-deciding product scope.
